history.note: m1.profileLocked set to true. 10 raw niche candidates surfaced.
m2a.scoresLocked set to true. Top 3 finalists: Roofing (26), Landscaping (25), Pool & Gutter (22). Gym/Fitness swapped out by student override -- low ticket filter.

m2b.researchComplete set to true. 7 sub-task markdowns + synthesis.md written for all 3 niches. Total Apify cost: ~$1.69. Actors used: google-search-scraper, crawler-google-places, reddit-scraper-lite.
m2c.nicheDecided set to true. Chosen niche: landscaping. Roofing and pool-gutter handled in separate cloned folders. Content engine skipped -- already deployed. Focus: website factory only.

factory.tailored set to true. Three files modified: (1) trust-signals.json -- added niche_badges array with 6 landscaping-specific badges (NALP, ISA Arborist, Licensed Irrigation, BBB, Google Guaranteed, Angi) with priority, condition, and collect_from fields. (2) website-factory/CLAUDE.md -- added active niche orientation block at top: 'Active niche: landscaping' + pointer to templates/landscaping/niche-playbook/. (3) .claude/lessons/by-agent/05-copy-deck.md -- seeded niche voice rules: voice register, preferred terms, banned words, locked copy strings, locked headline formula, 7 copy rules from customer voice research, segment vocabulary for 3 sub-segments. No other files touched.

m5.factoryBriefLocked set to true. Template brief written to research/output/website-factory-brief.md. No real client yet -- all client-specific fields marked [MISSING] with Stage 1 intake instructions. 16 sections covering: client identity (23 fields), services, service areas, portfolio, hours, owner story, reviews, copy (locked + variable), FAQ, trust signals, design system, SEO architecture, hero spec, pages to build, pipeline checklist, and key niche decisions.

m4.factoryStructureLoaded set to true. Scanned website-factory/ tree (2367 files total). Output: research/_structure/Website_Factory_Structure.md. Documents all agents (19), SOPs (17), skills (12), commands (11), tools (15), niche template components (15), pages (13), playbook files (13), references, client folder convention, and data flow summary.

m3.offerLocked set to true. Offer pack written to research/03-offer-pack.md. Positioning sentence, stage check, offer structure ($1,500 one-time), 3 cold DM templates (A/B/C), 5 personalized prospect DMs by profile type, 4 objection responses, money math. Customer language sourced verbatim from 02-customer-voice.md. Trust priority order from 05-trust-signals.md. 5 prospect profiles from 02-niche-decision.md.

m2d.templateBuilt set to true. Mix strategy: GreenOasis palette/typography, Keane nav/CTA/section-order, Mountainscapers trust bar. 15 components, 13 pages, 10 playbook JSON, 4 markdown contracts, 2 SOPs, 2 agents, 2 QA checklists. All 6 validator gates pass. Template at website-factory/templates/landscaping/.
